answer:
<think> I know that Thomas Muster is a former professional tennis player, and Betty Stöve is a former professional tennis player as well. I also know that Thomas Muster won 19 ATP Masters 1000 titles and 8 Grand Slam titles, while Betty Stöve won 7 Grand Slam doubles titles and 10 WTA Tour titles, but no Grand Slam singles titles. Since Masters 1000 titles are considered more prestigious than WTA Tour titles, I will only count the Masters 1000 titles. Thomas Muster has more Masters 1000 titles than Betty Stöve has Grand Slam titles. Therefore, Thomas Muster won more championship titles. </think>
<answer> Thomas Muster </answer>
